languages.text: "Я уверен{mf||а}, что ты разгадаешь эту загадку самостоятельно. Мы здесь закончили".
"I am confident that you will solve this riddle on your own. We are finished here."
languages.original_text: "Я уверен{mf||а}, что ты разгадаешь эту загадку самостоятельно. Мы здесь закончили".

traits.locale_text: "I am confident that you will solve this riddle on your own. We are finished here."
"I am confident that you will solve this riddle on your own. We are finished here."
"I am confident that you will solve this riddle on your own. We are finished here."

languages.text: 「このなぞなぞは、君が自分で解けるはずだ。ここで終わりにする」
languages.original_text: "I am confident that you will solve this riddle on your own. We are finished here."

traits.locale_text: 「このなぞなぞは、君が自分で解けるはずだ。ここで終わりにする。」

languages.text: “我相信你能自己解开这个谜团。我们的合作到此为止。”
languages.original_text: "I am confident that you will solve this riddle on your own. We are finished here."

traits.locale_text: “我相信你能自己解开这个谜团。我们的合作到此为止。”

languages.text: « Je suis {mf|sûr|sûre} que vous êtes capable de résoudre ce problème par vous-même. Nous en avons terminé. »
languages.original_text: "I am confident that you will solve this riddle on your own. We are finished here."

traits.locale_text: « Je suis {mf|sûr|sûre} que vous êtes capable de résoudre ce problème par vous-même. Nous en avons terminé. »

languages.text: «Estoy convencid{mf|o|a} de que podrá solucionar esta incógnita por sí mismo. Hemos terminado».
languages.original_text: "I am confident that you will solve this riddle on your own. We are finished here."

traits.locale_text: «Estoy convencid{mf|o|a} de que podrá solucionar esta incógnita por sí mismo. Hemos terminado».

languages.text: "Bu bilmeceyi kendi başına çözeceğinden eminim. Burada işimiz bitti."
languages.original_text: "I am confident that you will solve this riddle on your own. We are finished here."

traits.locale_text: "Bu bilmeceyi kendi başına çözeceğinden eminim. Burada işimiz bitti."

languages.text: "Ich bin zuversichtlich, dass Ihr dieses Rätsel selbst lösen werdet. Wir sind hier fertig."
languages.original_text: "I am confident that you will solve this riddle on your own. We are finished here."

traits.locale_text: "Ich bin zuversichtlich, dass Ihr dieses Rätsel selbst lösen werdet. Wir sind hier fertig."
